title: The Escape Becomes Possible
description: On pages 16–19, this part focuses on the escape becomes possible, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Escape Becomes Possible. Sanji’s hidden role as Mr. Prince disrupts Crocodile’s plan and creates the opening the crew needs to escape. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Do you know why I've put myself through all this trouble and try to take over your country, Ms. Wednesday...?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: How would I know what goes on in that warped head of yours!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: What an ill-mannered princess you are...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: What do you think you're doing, Ms. Wednesday?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: If I head east right now...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I might just be able to reach alubanna before the rebels do!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's still a small chance that I can stop the rebels!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oh, what a coincidence! My associate and I,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Are also going to be on our way to Alubarma,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: To ask your father a question...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Who... WHAT DO YOU PLAN TO DO WITH MY FATHER!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Concerned? I wonder what's more important to you...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: In any case, whether you come along or not is your choice...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That's the key to this cage, isn't it!?

summary: This part develops the escape becomes possible and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
